faithful_note: Log-polar zoom is the BEST of 3 models vs headless (~20-22 dB > linear-radius > displacement-prop), confirming the decode. Residual ~20 dB ceiling is the log-polar resampling near the centre (u=ln r -> -inf as r->0). The shipping Blurs__Zoom Zoom Blur filter is authored Amount=0 (STATIC; visible zoom is camera) so near-zero gate ROI. Center wired, Mix=blend. Documented directional-blur.ts.
